title: viola × molleri
intro: Viola × molleri is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between the sweet violet (Viola odorata) and the common pansy (Viola tricolor). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Viola × molleri include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. In herbal preparations, Viola × molleri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
